Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Appearance At Depositon And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-15-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. G. RYAN PATRICK, ESQ. of Wiegel Law Group, PLC, Tel No. 415-552-8230 appearing for Defendants Sequoia Mortgage Capital, Inc., Sequoia Mortgage Fund, LLC, and Jason H. Freskos;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Defense counsel stipulates to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS SEQUOIA MORTGAGE CAPITAL, INC., SEQUOIA MORTGAGE FUND, AND JASON FRESKOS' Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Appearance At Depositon And Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted, unopposed. Sanctions awarded in the amount of $3,000 against Stephen and Leslie Schiefer and their counsel Paul Manasian, to be paid to moving party's counsel within 10 days of service of this order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-23-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: G. Ryan Patrick, for Defendant Sequoia Mortgage, Inc.
No appearance by plaintiff
The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANTS SEQUOIA MORTGAGE CAPITAL, INC. A CALIFORNIA and SEQUOIA MORTGAGE FUND, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is GRANTED with leave to amend for plaintiffs to (1) allege in good faith facts explaining the inconsistency between allegations in complaint and First Amended Complaint, paragraphs 14; (2) to allege in good faith facts supporting Plaintiff's understanding that the loan was to be primarily personal (See Opposition 2:20-22). Request for Judicial Notice of the Note is DENIED. Order signed and filed in open court.
